name: Litherland's Amaretto Sour Jiggle Shots
recipeIngredient: 2 small boxes (or 1 large box) lime jell-o
1 dash lemon juice (either a shots-worth or a tablespoon would do)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the jello and boiling water with the amaretto until well combined.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. Pour into 2-ounce cups or a large pan and chill.
4. If using a large pan, cut into smaller servings of 2 ounces before serving.
(Optional: Add another 1-2 cups of cold water if you prefer your Jello Shots to be less stiff.)
